nasb.text: Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy, and heed the things which are written in it; for the time is near.

esv.text: Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear, and who keep what is written in it, for the time is near.

cnv.text: 讀這書上預言的人，和那些聽見這預言並且遵守書中記載的人，都是有福的！因為時候近了。

ccb.text: 那位宣读这预言的人和那些听见并遵守其中内容的人有福了，因为日期近了。

csbs.text: 那宣读这预言之话的，那些听见这预言之话并遵守其中所记载的，都是蒙福的，因为时候快到了。
